subcodes.first_line: O loving friend! Your letter dated 22 April 1919, written from London, was received, as was your previous missive [3.5s]... ...Bahaʼuʼllah and the Bab were both Iranians, and some twenty-thousand Iranians have sacrificed themselves in this path. I, too, am an Iranian
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رفیق مهربان نامه که بتاریخ ۲۲ آپریل ۱۹۱۹ از لندن مرقوم نموده بودی رسید ولی مکتوب پیش
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @praise and encouragement, @praise of Eastern values; culture, @martyrs and martyrdom
